name: GDH Guangnan (Holdings) Limited
summary: GDH Guangnan (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells tinplates and related products primarily in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through three divisions: Tinplating, Fresh and Live Foodstuffs, and Property Leasing. The Tinplating division provides tinplates and tin-free steel; and processed products, such as coated/printed tinplate/tin-free steel, as well as cold-rolled steel plates. Its tinplate and tin-free steel products are used in food, light, and chemical industries. It is also involved in the research and development, production, and sale of tinplated steel sheets, chrome-plated steel sheets, and other processed products. The Fresh and Live Foodstuffs division engages in the distribution of livestock and poultry, such as cattle and chicken; sale of live pigs; wholesale of poultry; and trading of foodstuffs, including chilled poultry and pork, frozen poultry, and rice and starch. The Property Leasing division leases offices and factory buildings. The company was formerly known as Guangnan (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to GDH Guangnan (Holdings) Limited in June 2020. GDH Guangnan (Holdings) Limited was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. GDH Guangnan (Holdings) Limited is a subsidiary of GDH Limited.
